aiExplanation.summary: The AI Brain is a local NLP pipeline that processes natural language input, determines user intent, extracts entities, and dispatches OS actions — all without any external LLM.
aiExplanation.beginner: When you type 'open weather' to the AI assistant, it needs to understand what you mean. The AI Brain breaks your sentence apart, figures out you want to open the Weather app, and then actually opens it. It does all this right in your browser — no internet AI needed.
aiExplanation.technical: The pipeline consists of 7 stages: Speech Recognition (Web Speech API) → Intent Engine (regex + fuzzy matching against intent patterns) → Entity Extraction (NER via pattern matching for app names, cities, dates) → Context Manager (conversation state, pronoun resolution, recent actions) → Knowledge Graph (JSON document queries) → Response Generator (template-based NLG) → Action Dispatcher (Zustand store mutations). The entire pipeline runs client-side with O(n) complexity per query.
aiExplanation.recruiter: The developer built a complete AI assistant that runs entirely in the browser — no API calls, no OpenAI, no external dependencies. It understands natural language commands, maintains conversation context, and can control the entire OS. This demonstrates NLP engineering, system design, and creative problem-solving.

pipeline.label: Speech Recognition
pipeline.description: Captures raw audio and converts it to text strings.

pipeline.label: Intent Engine
pipeline.description: Matches raw text against regex and fuzzy patterns to determine user intent.

pipeline.label: Entity Extraction
pipeline.description: Identifies specific nouns like app names, dates, or cities from the query.

pipeline.label: Context Manager
pipeline.description: Maintains conversation history and current OS state.

pipeline.label: Knowledge Graph
pipeline.description: Queries static JSON documents for facts, projects, and skills.

pipeline.label: Response Generator
pipeline.description: Crafts human-readable responses based on the executed intent.

pipeline.label: Action Dispatcher
pipeline.description: Fires Zustand state updates to open apps or change OS settings.
